text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, on my way back to my<n>office...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Hey, hear me out for a sec!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm a simp for everyone, not just my<n>squad! But
it's not like I can vibe with<n>everyone whenever I
want!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I know they're just as down<n>bad for me,
but all these hangout<n>invites got me cooked!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, what's the matter? I'm<n>right here if
you need someone to talk<n>to.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oooh... Bestiiie! I need to raaant!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oooh okay, so you have too many<n>friends you
wanna hang out with, and<n>not enough time.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Straight facts! Like, I wuv all my<n>friends! And I
have lots of fun chatting<n>with you, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: There you are. It's time for our run,<n>Helios.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
See?! I wanna hang out with Nature<n>too! I'm
bummed, no cap!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I'm not here to hang out, we're<n>supposed
to be partner running.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Helios! Hiya! I'm gonna do some<n>bargain
hunting. Wanna come?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Bet! But I gotta race with Nature! And<n>chat up
Palmer!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
This high-key suuuucks! What do I<n>doooo?!
Heeelp!
choice_data_list: ...Why don't you all hang out together?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
OH! For real! We should all just have<n>a party
together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... How about the dorm<n>kitchen? It can fit
lots of people, and<n>we don't gotta worry about
curfew.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, someone understood the<n>assignment!
That's a fire idea! A<n>pajama party!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Now that's giving teen spirit! I'll bring<n>some
Umastagram-worthy drinks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They organized a party just like that...<n>Extroverts
really are scary...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Can you bring that dried squid youlike, Nature? I just know it'd goviral!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? When did I get reeled into this<n>party?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be there too! Having a<n>trainer at the
party would be fire!<n>WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta be there too! Having a<n>trainer at the
party would be fire!<n>WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Let's gooooo! You passed the vibe<n>check! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
And as your rewaaard... You get to be<n>the party
squad leader! Let's turn this<n>party into a real
banger!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Fuji! We're gonna have a party<n>at the dorm!
See ya there! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, just a moment. Trainers are not<n>allowed to
enter the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: ...I end up getting photos of the party<n>later.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Just give up. There's no<n>stopping Helios
once she's hooked<n>on an idea.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Facts! Never underestimate a party<n>animal! ☆
choice_data_list: Uh, trainers can't enter the dorms!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! Are you for real?! Wanna<n>wear my
uniform to get in then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's a fun idea, but super obvious.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Boo! That's straight up sucks! But,<n>well, dem's
the breaks! I'll tag you in<n>the photos though!
